title: Iran targeted but did not hit Diego Garcia base with missiles, WSJ reports
summary_full: One missile failed in flight, while the other was intercepted, The Wall Street Journal reports, quoting U.S. officials.
summary_public: One missile failed in flight, while the other was intercepted, The Wall Street Journal reports, quoting U.S. officials.
